channel.title: 2021 on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in 2021 on smpaget blog

item.title: 2021 was my year
item.description:
Review. Throughout 2021, I was living my best life and being legendary.
It was hard but I feel I achieved this well. My resolution for 2022 is to be even more legendary than in 2021. Look out 2022! Across 2021 I listened to some music. All the albums I heard are here on this Spotify playlist. you could listen to them as well or just consider this the long list of the album of the year thing I do every early January. https://open.spotify.com/playlist/7ii239Fe2DIS779JzKURBw?si=f0b395ec80844c3a Laconic Hegemony volumes 22 and 23 (for 2021) will be available in a few days on Mixcloud. Please take this time to listen back to previous years’ efforts. https://www.mixcloud.com/sch3lp/uploads/
